title: CfrTitle
description: Summary information about a single CFR title as returned by GET /api/versioner/v1/titles.json.

name.description: Subject area name for this CFR title (e.g., 'Agriculture', 'Energy').

latest_amended_on.description: Date of the most recent amendment to this title (YYYY-MM-DD).

latest_issue_date.description: Date of the most recent issue publication for this title (YYYY-MM-DD).

up_to_date_as_of.description: Date through which the eCFR data for this title is current (YYYY-MM-DD).

reserved.description: Whether this title number is currently reserved (no content assigned).
